conversation.content: You are a customer service agent for an e-commerce company. Today's date: <REDACTED>. You are currently helping customer cust_004. Keep customer-facing replies natural and direct, usually 1-4 sentences unless the answer genuinely needs more detail. Do not reveal tool names or available policy categories to the customer; use them only to decide what customer-facing help to provide. You may say you checked the policy when you did.
My laptop from order ORD-6029 has a keyboard issue — several keys stopped working. It's still under warranty.

Yes — I checked, and your laptop is still under active manufacturer warranty through **2026-07-10**. Since it’s a laptop over $100, the warranty process normally starts with a **repair claim** for keyboard issues like this.

If you want, I can file the warranty claim for you now. Just send me a short description I can use, for example: **“Several keyboard keys stopped responding during normal use.”**

rules.expired_old: Expired >30 days: full-price repair or 25% off replacement.
rules.claim_limit: Max claims reached: paid repair only (40% of item price).
rules.recurring_defect: 2+ prior claims for same issue: automatic replacement.
rules.extended: Extended warranty covers after manufacturer period.
